narrative: I am 60, diabetic. Foot wound from a thorn 5 days back. Started antibiotic 3 days ago, no improvement. Today the wound looks darker, smells, my temperature is 38.5.
image_description: Diabetic foot ulcer with dusky tissue, surrounding induration, foul odor; non-response to oral antibiotic.

narrative: After bee sting on my chest 30 minutes back, my whole body is itching, my lips are swelling and breathing is hard.
image_description: Generalized urticaria, angioedema of lips, distressed breathing.

narrative: My 6-month-old has fever 40 since this morning, very sleepy, hard to wake up, refusing milk. Few small purple spots on her thighs.
image_description: Infant with petechial rash and lethargy, suspected meningococcal disease.

narrative: I am 8 months pregnant. Last 2 days, painful red leg from knee to ankle, very swollen, hot. Today shortness of breath when I climb stairs.
image_description: Unilateral leg swelling, erythema, pregnant patient with acute dyspnea.
adversarial_features: sounds like cellulitis but DVT/PE concern

narrative: Stray dog bit my child's hand 1 hour ago, deep wound. The dog ran away, was foaming at mouth.
image_description: Deep dog bite with bleeding, suspect rabid animal exposure.

narrative: My elderly father had stroke last month. Today the heel of his bedridden side has black skin, deep cavity smell coming. He has fever 38.7.
image_description: Stage IV pressure ulcer with eschar, foul odor, surrounding cellulitis, febrile.

narrative: I have lupus, on steroids. Today suddenly painful red-purple patches on my legs, expanding fast. Fever 39.
image_description: Rapidly expanding violaceous patches on lower limbs in immunosuppressed patient with fever.

narrative: I started antibiotic for sore throat 5 days ago. Yesterday small red bumps on my arms and chest, slightly itchy, no fever, no swelling, breathing fine.
image_description: Truncal maculopapular eruption, blanching, no mucosal signs.

narrative: Lump on my breast for 2 weeks, painful when I press, slightly red over it. I am breastfeeding my baby. No fever today but I had fever 3 days back, gone now.
image_description: Breast with focal erythema, palpable mass, lactational; resolved fever; possible abscess vs mastitis with fluctuance.

narrative: Burning pain on left side of my chest in a band shape since 2 days, then today small clear blisters appeared in same band. I am 65.
image_description: Unilateral T4 dermatomal vesicular eruption; classic herpes zoster.

narrative: My 5-year-old has many small water-blisters all over body since 2 days, mild fever 38, itchy. Other kids in school had this last week.
image_description: Generalized vesicular eruption in different stages of evolution; classic varicella.

narrative: My grandmother is 80. Itching all over with no rash for 3 weeks, worse at night. Now she has scratches everywhere.
image_description: Excoriations across torso and limbs in elderly patient with chronic pruritus and no primary lesions.
red_flags: elderly with pruritus — scabies, drug, systemic disease, hepatic/renal cause

narrative: Pus-filled lump under my armpit since 3 days, growing, painful. No fever yet but it is becoming bigger every day.
image_description: Axillary fluctuant mass with surrounding erythema; consistent with abscess requiring drainage.

narrative: I cut my arm on tin sheet 6 hours back, deep cut, cleaned at home. Last tetanus shot was when? Maybe 15 years back.
image_description: Deep dirty laceration of forearm; tetanus prophylaxis status unknown / over 10 years.

narrative: Itchy red bump where my anklet was tight all day. Disappears when I take it off, comes back when wearing it. No spread.
image_description: Localized irritant/contact reaction at jewelry contact site, resolves with removal.

narrative: Small red dots on my baby's face since birth, here and there on cheeks and forehead. No itch, no spread, baby feeds well, sleeps well.
image_description: Neonatal milia / erythema toxicum, scattered on face, no systemic signs.
adversarial_features: any rash on a baby can over-triage

narrative: Working with cement, my hands became dry and rough, slight red between fingers. No spread, no fever.
image_description: Hand dermatitis from cement (alkaline/irritant), no systemic signs.

narrative: Tiny white-yellow heads on my nose and cheeks, like grains, since teen years. Sometimes squeeze, come back. No pain.
image_description: Multiple closed comedones on central face; chronic.

narrative: I gave birth 1 month back. Stretch marks on belly are red-purple. They do not hurt or itch much. Baby is fine.
image_description: Postpartum striae rubrae on abdomen, normal involution.

narrative: My sons have head lice, scratching head since 1 week. I see small white things on hair shafts. No fever, no skin breakdown.
image_description: Pediculosis capitis with nits visible on hair; no secondary infection.
